entries.back_en: Th-That man... Could it be... Sir Oshtor?

I never imagined... Sir Oshtor himself...
Yes! That man... Sir Oshtor, Imperial Guard of the
entries.note: Fiel; frase truncada como no source.

entries.back_en: Right (direction), one of the Two Shields of Yamato...!
